content: Tuning PostgreSQL  Table of contents During install the CFEngine Enterprise Hub Package pre-configures PostgreSQL with a configuration for low ( 3GB 64GB) memory which adjusts the values of effective_cache_size , shared_buffers , and maintenance_work_mem . Depending on various factors your postgresql.conf may benefit from further tuning. Parameters commonly tuned: max_connections shared_buffers effective_cache_size maintenance_work_mem checkpoint_completion_target wal_buffers default_statistics_target random_page_cost effective_io_concurrency work_mem min_wal_size max_wal_size Tuning tools like pgtune and pgconfigurator can be helpful in adjusting your settings. See also: Debugging slow queries . Policy server requirements .
title: Tuning PostgreSQL
